signals.headline: Concourse ships 'Flux Agent' for NetSuite — auto-writes variance commentary into the GL
signals.summary: Our highest-requested capability for controllers is now in general availability: the Flux Agent drafts variance commentary directly into NetSuite memos, with citations back to transaction-level evidence. Internal dogfooding across 8 teams cut commentary time by 82%.

signals.headline: Snowflake native integration now live — agents read warehouse data without exports
signals.summary: Concourse agents can now query Snowflake directly via a first-party connector, removing the CSV-export workaround teams have been using. Security reviews cleared with SOC2 audit partner; PII masking enforced at the connector layer.

signals.headline: 10M agent-authored journal entries now cleared by customer controllers
signals.summary: Concourse has crossed 10 million agent-authored journal entries accepted by customer controllers across production workflows. A durable trust benchmark — worth publishing externally alongside a methodology note on how we measure acceptance rate.

signals.headline: Audit Trail Export goes GA — every agent action downloadable for audit
signals.summary: Audit Trail Export ships Monday. Finance teams can hand their auditor a single CSV covering every agent action, with source data, prompt, model, and approver. Directly addresses the pre-IPO objection sales has been hearing.

signals.headline: Ramp + Concourse: auto-categorized spend now flows into close workflows
signals.summary: New Ramp integration lets Concourse pull categorized card transactions and push close-cycle journal entries back. Built in direct response to Ramp's Autopilot Close announcement — positions Concourse as the workflow layer, not a dashboard.

signals.headline: Concourse named a 'Cool Vendor' in new Gartner AI for Finance report
signals.summary: Gartner's April report listed Concourse alongside two other vendors in the workflow-agent category. Citation-worthy, but the analyst note explicitly flags our NetSuite + Ramp + Snowflake coverage as the differentiator — worth amplifying.
